title: Fix admin login credentials

requirements.text: Update the admin login credentials in the backend so that username 'Luxyle Indore' and password 'Luxyle1234' are accepted and grant admin access successfully.

quotes: The username and password are not working

acceptanceCriteria: Logging in with username 'Luxyle Indore' and password 'Luxyle1234' returns a successful authentication response from the backend.
The AdminLoginForm component successfully authenticates and triggers the onSuccess callback when the correct credentials are entered.
Incorrect credentials continue to return an appropriate error response.

constraints: Do not change any other admin logic or access control behavior.
Do not modify any frontend immutable paths.
nonGoals: Adding multi-user authentication or additional admin accounts.
Implementing password hashing or encryption beyond what is already in place.
Changing the admin dashboard UI or layout.
